baseline.note: USA ROM only for policy and validation in this phase

entries.name: shard_bitfield_native
entries.source: Workbook + cheat cross-reference + ROM payload integration
entries.verification: Integrated and used by polling path; pending repeatable BizHawk confirmation per promotion_criteria

entries.name: big_chest_bitfield_native
entries.source: gTreasures layout cross-reference + shard_bitfield_native anchor + live client integration
entries.verification: Integrated and used by polling path for Cabbage Cavern, Olive Ocean, and Peppermint Palace major chests; pending repeatable BizHawk confirmation per promotion_criteria

entries.name: boss_mirror_table_native
entries.verification: Integrated as observational probe only; rising-edge transitions are logged in client for live mapping

entries.name: ai_kirby_state_native
entries.source: Live-mapped AI state candidate integrated for goal mode polling
entries.verification: Integrated with semantics: 9999 = Dark Mind clear trigger, 10000 = 100% progression signal

entries.name: ai_kirby_state_native
entries.source: Live-mapped AI state candidate integrated for goal mode polling
entries.verification: Integrated with semantics: 10000 used for Goal=100% completion signal

entries.name: kirby_hp_native
entries.source: katam include/kirby.h (struct Kirby hp field) + katam linker.ld (gKirbys base 0x02020EE0)
entries.verification: Integrated for runtime DeathLink receive/apply (HP->0) and local alive->dead transition detection; pending repeatable BizHawk confirmation per promotion_criteria

entries.name: shadow_kirby_encounters_native
entries.verification: Candidate only; observational client probe support exists when an address is mapped, but no production address is verified yet

entries.name: mirra_encounters_native
entries.verification: Candidate only; observational client probe support exists when an address is mapped, but no production address is verified yet

entries.name: cannon_travel_window
entries.verification: No stable global memory signal confirmed; likely requires hook-based instrumentation rather than polling

entries.name: warp_star_travel_window
entries.verification: No stable global memory signal confirmed; likely requires hook-based instrumentation rather than polling

promotion_criteria: Observed on USA ROM in BizHawk during real gameplay action
Before/after memory transition captured with exact address and width
Reproduced consistently in at least 3 independent attempts
Persistence behavior validated as applicable (room transition/save reload)
No AP mailbox transport field is used as native game-state source of truth
ADDRESS_VERIFICATION_MATRIX.md and this registry updated together
